scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check apps/api/app capabilities domains execution governance infra intelligence orchestrator packs shared state
scripts.format:check:py: uv run ruff format --check apps/api/app capabilities domains execution governance infra intelligence orchestrator packs shared state
scripts.test:unit: cross-env PFIOS_ENV=test PFIOS_DEBUG=false PFIOS_REASONING_PROVIDER=mock PFIOS_DB_URL=duckdb:///./data/quality-unit.duckdb uv run pytest -q tests/unit
scripts.test:unit:pg: cross-env PFIOS_ENV=test PFIOS_DEBUG=false PFIOS_REASONING_PROVIDER=mock PFIOS_DB_URL=postgresql://pfios:***@127.0.0.1:5432/pfios_test uv run pytest -q tests/unit
scripts.test:integration:core: cross-env PFIOS_ENV=test PFIOS_DEBUG=false PFIOS_REASONING_PROVIDER=mock PFIOS_DB_URL=duckdb:///./data/quality-integration.duckdb uv run pytest -q tests/integration/test_hermes_analyze_api.py tests/integration/test_health_monitoring_api.py tests/integration/test_scheduler_persistence.py tests/integration/test_api_product_surfaces.py tests/integration/test_api_semantic_outputs.py tests/integration/test_workflow_run_lineage_api.py
